# REST Resource: connect Stay organized with collections Save and categorize content based on your preferences.

*   Resource
*   Methods

## Resource

There is no persistent data associated with this resource.

 

## Methods

### generateEphemeralCert

Generates a short-lived X509 certificate containing the provided public key and signed by a private key specific to the target instance.

### get

Retrieves connect settings about a Cloud SQL instance.
